extensions.name: Aider
extensions.description: AI pair programming tool that lets you edit code in your terminal using GPT-4 and Claude.

env_vars.description: OpenAI API key
Anthropic API key

features.name: AI Pair Programming
features.description: AI pair programming in your terminal

extensions.name: AnythingLLM
extensions.description:
All-in-one AI productivity tool for RAG chat with documents.
Built-in vector database, supports multiple LLM providers,
and runs entirely on-device for privacy.

env_vars.description: JWT secret for session tokens (auto-generated by setup.sh)
API authentication token (auto-generated by setup.sh)

features.name: RAG Document Chat
features.description: Chat with uploaded documents using retrieval-augmented generation

features.name: AI Agents
features.description: AI agents for automated workflows

extensions.name: AudioCraft
extensions.description:
Meta's AudioCraft is a generative AI for audio. Features MusicGen for
text-to-music generation and AudioGen for text-to-sound effects.
Create royalty-free music and sound effects from text descriptions.

features.name: Music Generation
features.description: Generate music from text descriptions with MusicGen

features.name: Sound Effects
features.description: Generate sound effects from text with AudioGen

extensions.name: Bark TTS
extensions.description:
Bark is a transformer-based text-to-audio model by Suno AI. Unlike
traditional TTS, Bark generates highly expressive, realistic speech including
laughter, sighs, hesitation, and non-verbal sounds. Supports 13 languages
with multiple voice presets per language. Can also generate music and sound
effects. Ideal when you need natural, emotionally-expressive voice output
beyond what rule-based TTS can deliver.

Note: First startup downloads ~5GB of models. Subsequent starts are fast.

env_vars.description: Use smaller/faster Bark models (less VRAM, slightly lower quality)
Offload Bark models to CPU between requests (reduces VRAM usage)
API key for Bark TTS service authentication (optional; leave empty to disable auth)

features.name: Expressive TTS
features.description: Highly realistic speech with laughter, sighs, and emotion

features.name: Multilingual
features.description: 13 language voice presets (English, German, Spanish, French, etc.)

features.name: Sound Effects
features.description: Generate music snippets and ambient sound effects

extensions.name: Baserow
extensions.description:
Open-source no-code database tool and Airtable alternative.
Create databases, tables, and views with a spreadsheet-like interface.
Self-hosted with no storage restrictions. MIT licensed.

features.name: No-Code Database
features.description: No-code database with spreadsheet interface

features.name: Multiple Views
features.description: Grid, gallery, form, and calendar views

features.name: REST API
features.description: Headless REST API for all data

features.name: Collaboration
features.description: Real-time collaboration and permissions

extensions.name: ChromaDB
extensions.description: AI-native open-source vector database for storing and querying embeddings.

features.name: Vector Database
features.description: AI-native vector database for embeddings

extensions.name: Continue (AI Coding Assistant)
extensions.description: Open-source AI coding assistant for VS Code and JetBrains with local LLM support.

features.name: Continue Coding Assistant
features.description: AI-powered coding assistant for VS Code and JetBrains. Installs the Continue extension in your IDE and points it at Dream Server's local LLM — no cloud required.

extensions.name: CrewAI
extensions.description:
CrewAI is a multi-agent framework for AI workflows. It enables autonomous
AI agents to collaborate, delegate tasks, and work together to solve
complex problems. Perfect for building agent teams that simulate real-world
collaboration and decision-making.

features.name: Multi-Agent Teams
features.description: Teams of autonomous AI agents working together

features.name: Task Delegation
features.description: Automatic task distribution between agents

features.name: Sequential Process
features.description: Step-by-step task execution with defined order

features.name: Hierarchical Process
features.description: Manager-led coordination with validation

features.name: Event-Driven Flows
features.description: Event-driven workflows for complex automations

extensions.name: Dify
extensions.description: LLMOps platform for building AI workflows, RAG pipelines, and autonomous agents.

env_vars.description: Dify secret key for API access (generate with: openssl rand -hex 32)
External URL for Dify - used in API responses and redirects (default: http://localhost:8002)
OpenAI-compatible API endpoint for LLM backend (default: http://llama-server:8080/v1)
API key for OpenAI-compatible endpoint (default: dummy-key)
Initial admin password (optional, set in .env)

features.name: AI Agent Platform
features.description: Build and deploy AI agents and workflows

extensions.name: Flowise
extensions.description:
Visual LLM workflow builder with drag-and-drop interface.
Build AI agents, chatbots, and automation flows without code.
Integrates with OpenAI, Anthropic, local models, and 100+ tools.

env_vars.description: Admin username for Flowise UI (default: admin)
Admin password for Flowise UI (auto-generated by setup.sh)

features.name: Visual Workflow Builder
features.description: Visual drag-and-drop workflow builder for AI agents and chatbots

features.name: Tool Integrations
features.description: 100+ integrations with databases, APIs, and LLM providers

extensions.description: Simplified Stable Diffusion interface inspired by Midjourney's ease of use. Not yet supported for local deployment — requires RunPod cloud platform.

features.name: Image Generation

extensions.name: Forge / A1111
extensions.description:
Forge (based on Automatic1111) is the original Stable Diffusion web UI.
Features extensive model support, extensions, inpainting, outpainting,
and professional-grade image generation capabilities. GPU required.

features.name: Image Generation
features.description: Full Stable Diffusion control with advanced settings

features.name: Inpainting
features.description: Inpainting with mask support

features.name: Outpainting
features.description: Outpainting beyond image boundaries

features.name: Upscaling
features.description: High-resolution upscaling with multiple engines

extensions.name: Frigate
extensions.description:
Frigate is an open-source NVR (Network Video Recorder) with realtime
local object detection for IP cameras. It uses AI to detect people,
vehicles, and other objects without sending video to the cloud.

env_vars.description: RTSP password for camera streams

features.name: Object Detection
features.description: Real-time AI object detection on camera streams

features.name: Recording

features.name: Notifications

InvokeAI is a leading creative engine for Stable Diffusion models. 
Professional-grade image generation with a node-based canvas, layer support,
and FLUX model compatibility. Best-in-class UI for serious creators.

features.name: Control Layers

extensions.name: Jan

Jan is a ChatGPT alternative that runs 100% offline on your computer.
Multi-engine support (llama.cpp, TensorRT-LLM). Local-first, privacy-focused.

Label images, audio, text, time series, and more for ML model training.

Langflow is a visual LLM workflow builder that lets you create
complex AI workflows with a drag-and-drop interface. Supports
LangChain components, custom components, and real-time testing.

features.description: Visual LLM workflow builder with drag-and-drop and LangChain components

extensions.description:
LibreChat is an enhanced ChatGPT clone with multi-LLM support,
agents, RAG, and file uploads. Supports OpenAI, Anthropic, Google,
Azure, Groq, Mistral, OpenRouter, and custom endpoints.

AES initialization vector for credential encryption (auto-generated by setup.sh)

extensions.name: Open Interpreter
extensions.description:
Open Interpreter lets LLMs run code locally (Python, JavaScript, Shell, etc.).
It provides a ChatGPT-like interface in your terminal and can control Chrome,
create/edit files, analyze datasets, and more. Fully local, no API costs.
Requires OPEN_INTERPRETER_API_KEY for authentication. Auto-run is disabled
by default (set OPEN_INTERPRETER_AUTO_RUN=true to enable).

env_vars.description: API key for authentication

features.name: Local Code Execution
features.description: Run Python, JavaScript, and Shell code locally via LLM

features.name: Data Analysis
features.description: Plot, clean, and analyze large datasets with AI assistance

extensions.name: Paperless-ngx
extensions.description:
Paperless-ngx is a document management system that transforms your physical
documents into a searchable online archive. OCR, tagging, automatic
classification, and full-text search for PDFs and images.

env_vars.description: Django secret key for session security (auto-generated by setup.sh)

features.name: OCR
features.description: Automatic OCR for scanned PDFs and images

features.name: Document Tags
features.description: Auto and manual tagging for organization

features.name: Full-Text Search
features.description: Search inside all your documents

features.name: Email Import
features.description: Import documents via email

extensions.description: Fast and lightweight text-to-speech engine optimized for edge and low-resource devices.

extensions.name: SillyTavern
extensions.description: Advanced character-based roleplay and chat frontend with extensive customization.

features.name: Character Chat

extensions.name: Text Generation WebUI
extensions.description:
Text Generation WebUI (Oobabooga) is the most feature-complete local LLM
inference interface. Supports GPTQ, GGUF, AWQ, EXL2, and HF transformer
formats. Includes a chat UI, API server, extensions marketplace, LoRA
loading, and advanced generation parameters. The goto tool for power users
who need full control over inference settings.

features.name: LLM Inference
features.description: Load and run GGUF, GPTQ, AWQ, EXL2, and HF transformer models

features.name: Chat Interface
features.description: Instruct and chat mode UI with character support

features.name: OpenAI-Compatible API
features.description: OpenAI-compatible API server with extensions and LoRA support

extensions.name: Weaviate
extensions.description:
Weaviate is an open-source vector database that stores both objects and vectors.
Supports semantic search, hybrid search, structured filtering, and multi-tenancy.
A cloud-native alternative to ChromaDB with gRPC support and horizontal scaling.

env_vars.description: API key for Weaviate authentication (auto-generated by setup.sh)

features.name: Vector Search
features.description: Semantic similarity search with vector embeddings

features.name: Hybrid Search
features.description: Combine vector similarity with keyword matching

features.name: Multi-Tenancy
features.description: Isolated data spaces for different users/organizations

extensions.name: XTTS (Coqui TTS)
extensions.description: Coqui XTTS voice cloning and multilingual text-to-speech server.
